name: Apple Spiced Iced Tea
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the apples into thin slices and remove the cores and seeds. Place half of the slices in the steeping pot.
2. Mix the cinnamon and sugar until uniform in color, then sprinkle over the apple slices in the steeping pot.
3. Follow the directions for making iced tea with your machine (e.g., Mr. Coffee Ice Tea Pot). Add the teabags to the steeping pot on top of the apples.
4. Add the remaining apple slices to the pitcher on top of the ice. Assemble the machine and pitcher, then turn on.
5. When the tea is done, add the apple slices from the steeping pot to the pitcher along with more ice to fill. Stir vigorously and serve.
This recipe was shared by Fred Goslin on Cyberealm Bbs and KookNet in Watertown, NY.
